title: Max Life Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Max Life Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Max Life Insurance in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Max Life Insurance:
Max Life Insurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Life Insurance!
